title: Clash of Clans clan war — DestRoYeRs Battle Day 3
html:
Screenshot of the "DestRoYeRs" Clash of Clans clan war page (Battle Day 3, 1505 trophies, 1000-trophy entry, 5500 required) — a glimpse of Yahir's mobile-game leaderboard fluency that informs the brotein / outpace streak loops.

clash of clans · brotein · outpace · gaming loops
